name: set_logic_unconnected
short_description: Sets logic unconnected for output ports and output pins
full_help:
set_logic_unconnected

Description: 
Sets logic unconnected for output ports and output pins

Syntax: 
set_logic_unconnected  [-quiet] [-verbose] <objects>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <objects>   List of output ports and output pins

Categories: 
XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
